title: Unsplash
description: Combined Unsplash feed: blog, status, API changelog, and (with an UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY) fresh wallpaper photos.

items.title: Read only mode during database Migration
items.content_text: THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 25 , 14:00 - 22:00 UTC Jul 21 , 14:43 UTC Scheduled - We are expanding our systems and during this scheduled database migration some errors might be reported. The site will be in read-only mode during the migration

items.title: AWS us-east issues
items.content_text: Oct 20 , 22:45 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Oct 20 , 19:29 UTC Update - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue. Oct 20 , 19:23 UTC Identified - We are seeing networking errors in our AWS dependent services.

items.title: Partial search outage
items.content_text: Oct 9 , 15:50 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Oct 9 , 15:20 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Oct 9 , 12:03 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating the elevated error rates observed at our search cluster.

items.title: Performance issues after DB upgrade
items.content_text: May 20 , 18:25 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 20 , 11:20 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. May 20 , 07:44 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

items.title: Performance issues during database upgrade
items.content_text: May 19 , 21:40 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 19 , 21:37 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. May 19 , 16:47 UTC Identified - We are seeing performance degradation during search due to a database upgrade.

items.title: Illustration access enabled for all API partners
items.content_text: All API partners can now access illustrations. Previously, this required a specific permission. Endpoints that return photos will now include illustrations as well.

items.title: Database upgrade
items.content_text: Nov 2 , 18:00 UTC Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed. Nov 2 , 16:14 UTC Verifying - Verification is currently underway for the maintenance items. Nov 2 , 12:00 UTC In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary. Oct 28 , 20:53 UTC Scheduled - The API will be in read-only mode; read operations (e.g., search) will remain unaffected however anything requiring a write will be unavailable until the upgrade is complete.

items.title: Removal of order_by from GET /photos
items.content_text: The photos Editorial feed will no longer support the order_by parameter, instead only returning photos in the latest order (the existing default).

items.title: Unsplash Source sunset
items.content_text: Unsplash Source has been officially unsupported since its deprecation in 2021. As part of the final sunsetting, we will first wind down by disabling the search feature, and in the coming weeks turn off the application entirely.

items.title: Elevated errors
items.content_text: Apr 22 , 14:11 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Apr 22 , 14:07 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Apr 22 , 14:03 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented.

items.title: Performance issues
items.content_text: Feb 6 , 17:22 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Feb 6 , 16:41 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

items.title: Database maintenance
items.content_text: Dec 24 , 18:00 UTC Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed. Dec 24 , 15:00 UTC In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary. Dec 22 , 18:39 UTC Scheduled - We will be undergoing scheduled maintenance during this time.

items.title: Elevated API errors
items.content_text: Dec 1 , 13:14 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Nov 30 , 18:32 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Nov 30 , 17:29 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue. Nov 30 , 15:14 UTC Investigating - API is currently experiencing intermittent elevated error rates and slow response times. We are currently investigating.

items.title: Increased error rates and connection timeouts
items.content_text: Feb 24 , 17:54 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Feb 24 , 17:16 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Feb 24 , 16:54 UTC Investigating - We are experiencing connectivity due to issues at our upstream hosting provider.

items.title: API database maintenance
items.content_text: Dec 28 , 18:47 UTC Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed. Dec 28 , 18:19 UTC Verifying - Upgrade process has completed; API and website will be coming back online. Dec 28 , 16:53 UTC Update - Upgrades are still in progress. We will continue to post updates as necessary. Dec 28 , 16:01 UTC In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary. Dec 21 , 21:34 UTC Scheduled - API and website will be unavailable during this time as we p

items.title: Unsplash Source being deprecated
items.content_text: Unsplash Source is being deprecated. Existing uses will continue to work, however for new projects use the full Unsplash API .

items.title: Tags property from search endpoints deprecation
items.content_text: The tags property from the /search and /search/photos endpoint is deprecated and will eventually be removed. This was an undocumented field and is superseded by tags_preview

items.title: Elevated error rate
items.content_text: Apr 30 , 14:44 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Apr 30 , 14:26 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Apr 30 , 14:22 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Apr 30 , 13:50 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue. Apr 30 , 13:38 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

items.title: GET /collections/featured removal
items.content_text: Following up on its deprecation in September, GET /collections/featured has been removed.

items.title: Query string added to photo download_location URL
items.content_text: Query string parameters have been added to the photo’s download_location URL. This may cause issues for client implementations adding their access token to the URL via string concatenation.

items.title: BlurHash added to photo objects
items.content_text: All photo objects from the Unsplash API now include a blur_hash string. This is a compact representation of an image which can be used as a placeholder before the real image loads.

items.title: Added topic endpoints
items.content_text: We have added new endpoints for topics:

items.title: Collections ID change and featured deprecation
items.content_text: Two changes to the Collections API:

items.title: Support for languages beta
items.content_text: We are adding support for non-english input languages to the search endpoint.

items.title: Dynamic Client Registration Support Added
items.content_text: For decentralized applications, like open source CMSs WordPress and Ghost, we’ve added support for dynamic client registration, which allows developers to grant individual API keys to users with a user-friendly signup process.

items.title: User likes statistics deprecation
items.content_text: The ‘likes’ data in the /users/:username/statistics response has been deprecated. The total value will be returning 0 going forward, with the entire fragment (i.e., including historical info) to be removed in the near future.

items.title: Deprecation of ordering by ‘popular’
items.content_text: We are deprecating the option to order photos by popular on all endpoints (e.g., GET /photos ). While the functionality will still exist in the immediate future, it will be soon be removed.

items.title: Content filtering
items.content_text: We’ve added a new section to the API documentation to publicly clarify our content safety guidelines :

items.title: New filtering and ordering options
items.content_text: GET /search/photos adds support for orientation, dominant color filtering, and relevancy vs latest ordering:

items.title: Deprecated endpoint EOL: curated photos, old search, photo stats
items.content_text: Three deprecated endpoints have been removed:

items.title: Curated Collections removal
items.content_text: The deprecated Curated Collection endpoints have been removed. This includes:

items.title: API parameter resizing deprecation
items.content_text: The custom cropping and resizing parameters accepted by the get a photo , get a random photo , and get a user endpoints are being deprecated and replaced instead with dynamic image URLs which are capable of more resizing and cropping options.

items.title: Abbreviation of top photos in users search and user endpoints
items.content_text: For performance reasons we are removing some of the deeply-nested photo objects returned in the search/users and users/:username endpoints.

items.title: Categories removal
items.content_text: Categories endpoints have been removed.

items.title: Curated Collections deprecation
items.content_text: Curated Collections are now deprecated. This includes endpoints:

items.title: Abbreviation of current_user_collections
items.content_text: For performance reasons we are removing some of the deeply-nested objects returned in the current_user_collections photo attribute. current_user_collections returns a list of collection objects, which will no longer include the user or cover_photo information.

items.title: Categories EOL
items.content_text: Categories endpoints won’t yet 404, but are returning empty data structures. e.g., /categories/:id/photos => []

items.title: Instagram username now public
items.content_text: Both full and abbreviated user responses now include the instagram_username attribute without requiring the read_user scope.

items.title: Filter photo search results by orientation
items.content_text: The /search and /search/photos/ endpoints will now accept an orientation parameter, and return photos only matching that. Valid values are landscape , portrait , and squarish .

items.title: Updated API Guidelines
items.content_text: We’ve updated the official Unsplash API Guidelines to include two new technical guidelines for all API applications:

items.title: Existing deprecations
items.content_text: Some endpoints and behaviour have already been deprecated, and are no longer officially supported:

items.title: Reactor online. Initializing API changelog.
items.content_text: We’ll be posting changes to the API starting from here. You can always find the current state of our API at https://unsplash.com/documentation
